div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

name.value: CQL Grammar File (G4)

description.value: The ANTLR4 grammar file for the CQL grammar

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support ELM in JSON (with annotations)

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CDS CQL Library serialized as JSON, with annotations included.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support ELM in XML (with annotations)

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CDS CQL Library serialized as XML, with annotations included.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support CQL Library

description.value: The ChlamydiaScreening_CDS CQL Library.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support ELM in JSON (with debug information)

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CDS CQL Library serialized as JSON, with debug information included.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support ELM in XML (with debug information)

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CDS CQL Library serialized as XML, with debug information included.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support ELM in JSON (without annotations or debug information)

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CDS CQL Library serialized as JSON, without annotations or debug information.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support (using Common) CQL Library

description.value: The ChlamydiaScreening_CDS_UsingCommon CQL Library using a Common library to demonstrate sharing of declarations between libraries.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support (using Common) ELM in JSON

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CDS_UsingCommon CQL Library serialized as JSON.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support (using Common) ELM in XML

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CDS_UsingCommon CQL Library serialized as XML.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Decision Support ELM in XML (without annotations or debug information)

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CDS CQL Library serialized as XML, without annotations or debug information.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Common CQL Library

description.value: The ChlamydiaScreening_Common CQL Library.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Common Library ELM in JSON

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_Common CQL Library serialized as JSON.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Common Library ELM in XML

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_Common CQL Library serialized as XML.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Quality Measure CQL Library

description.value: The ChlamydiaScreening_CQM CQL Library.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Quality Measure ELM in JSON

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CQM CQL Library serialized as JSON.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Quality Measure (using Common) CQL Library

description.value: The ChlamydiaScreening_CQM_UsingCommon CQL Library using a Common library to demonstrate sharing of declarations between libraries.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Quality Measure (using Common) ELM in JSON

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CQM_UsingCommon CQL Library serialized as JSON.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Quality Measure (using Common) ELM in XML

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CQM_UsingCommon CQL Library serialized as XML.

name.value: Chlamydia Screening Quality Measure ELM in XML

description.value: The ELM translation of the ChlamydiaScreening_CQM CQL Library serialized as XML.

name.value: Example CMS135 Quality Measure CQL Library

description.value: The CMS135_QDM CQL Library.

description.value: The ELM translation of the CMS135_QDM CQL Library serialized as JSON.

name.value: Example CMS135 Quality Measure ELM in XML

description.value: The ELM translation of the CMS135_QDM CQL Library serialized as XML.

description.value: The CMS146 CQL Library using the QUICK data model.

name.value: Related Context Retrieve Example CQL Library

description.value: Example CQL Library illustrating the related-context retrieve construct.

name.value: Related Context Retrieve Example ELM Library (JSON)

description.value: The ELM translation of the example CQL Library illustrating the related-context retrieve construct, serialized as JSON.

name.value: Related Context Retrieve Example ELM Library (XML)

description.value: The ELM translation of the example CQL Library illustrating the related-context retrieve construct, serialized as XML.

name.value: FHIRPath Grammar File (G4)

description.value: The ANTLR4 grammar file for the FHIRPath grammar

name.value: ELM Schema - ClinicalExpression

description.value: The ClincalExpression ELM Schema, which extends the Expression schema, adding clinically focused constructs such as Retrieve and Terminology capabilities.

name.value: ELM Schema - CQLAnnotations

description.value: The CQLAnnotations ELM Schema, which extends the base schemas, adding support for annotations.

name.value: ELM Schema - Expression

description.value: The base Expression ELM Schema, containing the core expression language and operations.

name.value: ELM Schema - Library

description.value: The Library ELM Schema, which defines the Library container for ELM.

name.value: ModelInfo Schema

description.value: The ModelInfo Schema, which defines a possible representation for Model Information usable by a CQL translator.

name.value: Test Schema

description.value: The Test Schema, shared with the FHIRPath specification, which defines a simple format for self-contained language tests.

name.value: ELM Schema - Types

description.value: The ELM Types Schema, which defines the system-defined types used to represent type information in ELM.

name.value: CQL Tests - Aggregate Functions

description.value: Aggregate functions test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Arithmetic Functions

description.value: Arithmetic functions test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Comparison Operators

description.value: Comparison operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Conditional Operators

description.value: Conditional operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - DateTime Operators

description.value: DateTime Operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - CQL Errors and Messaging Operators

description.value: CQL errors and messaging operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Interval Operators

description.value: Interval operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - List Operators

description.value: List operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Logical Operators

description.value: Logical operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Nullological operators

description.value: Nullological operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - String Operators

description.value: String operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Type Operators

description.value: Type operators test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Types

description.value: Types test cases.

name.value: CQL Tests - Value Literals and Selectors

description.value: Value literals and selectors test cases.
